name: Manifest
tagline: Chinatown coffee shop by day, cocktail bar by night — a creative hub with gallery vibes and excellent espresso.
parking: Street parking; paid lots on Maunakea St
talkStory: Opened around 2015 in a restored Chinatown building, Manifest was created by local creatives who wanted a space for both the morning laptop crowd and the nightlife scene. By day, excellent espresso in a serene, gallery-like space. By night, it transforms into a cocktail bar with rotating DJs and art openings. The dual identity has made it a hub for Honolulu’s artists, musicians, and gallery owners. Friday and Saturday nights are the most electric.
